ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-400", message: "Bad Request: " ++ error.description as String , correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "Resource not found: " ++ error.description as String , correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "Method Not allowed: " ++ error.description as String , correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-406", message: "Not Acceptable: " ++ error.description as String , correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-415", message: "Unsupported media type: " ++ error.description as String , correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-501", message: "Not implemented: " ++ error.description as String , correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-500", message: "DOWN", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 import nutrientMapping output application/java var nutrients = attributes.queryParams.*fields var mappedFields= nutrientMapping::mapToDbValues(nutrients) --- mappedFields map($ as String) joinBy (", ")

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Requested food nutrients with foodId: '++ (vars.foodId as String) import log --- log::buildLog("INFO",logMessage,vars.nutrients, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

set-variable.value: #["SELECT fdc_id, food_name, " ++ vars.nutrients ++ " FROM foods WHERE fdc_id = :foodId"]
set-variable.doc:name: Set Variable

logger.doc:name: NOT FOUND
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Requested food Id does not exist' var foodId = vars.foodId as String import log --- log::buildLog("INFO",logMessage,foodId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "NUTRITION-404", message: "food id: "++ vars.foodId as String ++ " does not exist", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Requested food: '++ (vars.name as String) import log --- log::buildLog("INFO",logMessage,null, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

db:select.doc:name: Select Foods
db:select.db:sql: SELECT fdc_id, food_name, category, serving_size_g FROM foods WHERE to_tsvector('english', food_name) @@ plainto_tsquery('english', :name) LIMIT :limit

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Requested full food nutrient data: ' var foodId = vars.foodId as String import log --- log::buildLog("INFO",logMessage,foodId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

db:select.doc:name: Select Foods
db:select.db:sql: SELECT fdc_id, food_name, category, source, serving_size_g, energy_kcal, protein_g, total_fat_g, saturated_fat_g, carbohydrates_g, dietary_fiber_g, sugars_g, sodium_mg, potassium_mg, calcium_mg, iron_mg, magnesium_mg, zinc_mg, vitamin_c_mg, vitamin_d_mcg, vitamin_b12_mcg FROM foods WHERE fdc_id = :foodId

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map(item) -> { foodId: item.fdc_id, name: item.food_name, category: item.category, servingSizeG: item.serving_size_g, source: "USDA Foundation Foods", nutrients: { energyKcal: item.energy_kcal, proteinG: item.protein_g, carbohydratesG: item.carbohydrates_g, dietaryFiberG: item.dietary_fiber_g, sugarsG: item.sugars_g, totalFatG: item.total_fat_g, saturatedFatG: item.saturated_fat_g, sodiumMg: item.sodium_mg, potassiumMg: item.potassium_mg, calciumMg: item.calcium_mg, ironMg: item.iron_mg, vitaminCMg: item.vitamin_c_mg, vitaminDMcg: item.vitamin_d_mcg, vitaminB12Mcg: item.vitamin_b12_mcg, magnesiumMg: item.magnesium_mg, zincMg: item.zinc_mg } }

logger.doc:name: NOT FOUND
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Requested food Id does not exist' var foodId = vars.foodId as String import log --- log::buildLog("INFO",logMessage,foodId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "NUTRITION-404", message: "food Id "++ vars.foodId as String ++ " does not exist", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
